testcase.name: 3140-concept-relationship-node-linkname-testcase
Concept Relationship Node Linkname Testcase
testcase.description: Table linkbase test case using a concept relationship node with different linknames

variation.name: Concept relationship node for standard presentation link
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A second, non-standard, presentation linkbase is present, but this is ignored. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for standard presentation link, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in the taxonomy's presentation linkbase. A second, non-standard, presentation linkbase is present, but this is ignored.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for custom presentation link
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard link name. Relationships from the standard presentation linkbase are ignored. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node for custom presentation link, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard link name. Relationships from the standard presentation linkbase are ignored.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a linkname expression
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard link name specified by an XPath expression. This variation has no instance.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a linkname expression, with instance
variation.description: Simple table with two columns (periods 2001, 2002) and a tree of concepts as rows. The concepts are arranged according to the parent-child relationships in a custom presentation linkbase that uses a non-standard link name specified by an XPath expression.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a linkname expression that does not evaluate to a QName
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the linkname using an XPath expression that does not evaluate to a QName.

variation.name: Concept relationship node with a linkname expression that evaluates to a sequence
variation.description: Invalid table with a concept relationship node that specifies the link name using an XPath expression that evaluates to a sequence of more than one QName.
